title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 26.520 - Plan submitted to vote, when
text:
26.520.  Plan submitted to vote, when. — The presiding officer of the house in which a resolution disapproving a reorganization plan has been introduced, unless the resolution has been previously accepted or rejected by that house, shall submit it to a vote of the membership not sooner than ten days or later than sixty days after the submission by the governor of the reorganization plan to which the resolution pertains.
(L. 1967 p. 98 § 3)
